hiring_velocity.observation: StreamlineOps has more than doubled open engineering postings in the last 60 days following a Series B close, with urgent demand for Kafka and Spark engineers.

budget_urgency.runway_pressure: Series B capital deployed for platform scaling — hiring window is now.

cost_pressure.signal: Offshore-friendly signals in 2 of 5 recent job postings
cost_pressure.icp_segment_implication: Cost-effective offshore augmentation is a viable pitch angle.

engineering_maturity.bench_match_notes: Strong data engineering stack. Bench has Kafka, Spark, and Kubernetes experience.

recommended_pitch_angle: Tenacious can provide experienced Kafka and Spark engineers to StreamlineOps immediately — matching their stack and saving 3-4 months of recruitment time.
